stemHtml:
Having joined the traffic circuit at a controlled aerodrome, all attempts to establish communication with the tower have failed. Which of the following options would you take to mitigate for communication failure?

1. Set the transponder code to 7600, if a radar service is provided
2. Set the transponder code to 7700, if a radar service is provided
3. Transmit your messages twice on the TWR frequency(ies)
4. Transmit your messages twice on the APP frequency(ies)
5. Precede your transmissions by the phrase "TRANSMITTING BLIND"
6. Lower the landing gear (if relevant to your aircraft) and show steady landing lights
7. Maintain your current heading and speed for the next 5 minutes
8. Perform regular radio checks to all stations
